title: Lullaby's Enchantment Artwork
description: Adds textures to Lullaby's new modded Enchantments in-game
body:
# Lullaby's Enchantment Art
Currently, Lullaby's art for his enchantment mods are not featured in-game. This Resource Pack textures the new enchantment books to give a new specific texture that the mods don't yet do. This is similar to resource packs like Xali's Enchanted Books but for Lullaby's enchantment mods.
- Add's support for Lullaby's mod [Enchantment Expansion](https://modrinth.com/datapack/enchantments-expansion) and all of his other enchantment mods.
- At least one of his enchantment mods are required in order for the pack to work. It only textures the books a mod adds and DOES NOT add the books by itself.
 
# License
This project follows the same license that the original art is registered under.
This project is approved by [Lullaby](https://modrinth.com/user/lullaby).
